title: Use Public Transport
description: Take a bus or train instead of driving today.

title: Reduce Electricity
description: Keep non-essential lights and appliances off for at least 4 hours.

title: Plastic-Free Week
description: Avoid all single-use plastics for an entire week.

title: Plant-Based Day
description: Eat only vegetarian or vegan meals for a day.

title: Compost Waste
description: Compost kitchen and garden waste to reduce landfill emissions.

title: Plant a Tree
description: Plant a tree in your garden
